verses.text: Efraim mualtung gammi Mikah a kici min nei mi khat om hi

Amah in a nu kiangah, “Ngun pek tul leh za khat hong kiguksak lai-in a gupa na samsiatna thu ka za hi. A ngunte pen keima guk hi a, tu-in hih lai-ah tuate om hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nu in, “Ka tapa aw, Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen,” a ci hi

Amah in ngun pek tul leh za khatte a nu kiangah piakik hi. A nu in, “A kisek milim khat leh a kisung milim khat bawlna dingin ka tapa-a' dingin Topa' tungah a ngunte ka apsa ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong piakik ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in a nu kiangah a sum a piakkik ciangin a nu in zong ngun pek za nih la-in, a kisek milim khat leh a kisung milim khata a bawlsak ngunsekpa kiangah pia a, tuate pen Mikah' inn sungah om hi
Tua mipa Mikah in biakna phual khat nei a, amah in siampipuan khat leh innsung pasian-te bawlin siampi a suak dingin a tapate khat a koih hi
Tua hun lai-in Israel sungah kumpi omlo a, mi khempeuh amau' hoihsak bang ciatin gamta uh hi
Tua hun laitakin Judah gam Bethlehem khuasungah Levi mi tangval khat om hi
Tua mipa a muhna mun peuhpeuhah a teng dingin Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin paikhia hi. Tua bangin khualzinin a pai laitakin Efraim mualtung gamsunga Mikah' inn-ah va tung hi
Mikah in ama kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Judah gamsung Bethlehem khua-a om Levi mi ka hi a, mun ka muhna peuhah a peem ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Mikah in ama kiangah, “Kei tawh hong omin kei-a' dingin pa leh siampi hong hi in; kum khatin ngun pek sawm, puan silh khat, leh annek kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Levi mipa zong Mikah tawh a tengkhawm dingin lungkim hi. Tangvalpa pen ama tungah a tapate khat tawh kibang hi
Mikah in Levi mipa koihin, tangvalpa ama siampi suakin Mikah' inn-ah a om hi
Tua ciangin Mikah in, “ Topa in kei hong daupaisak ding hi, ci-in tu-in ka thei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampi-in Levi mite khat ka neita hi,” a ci hi.
